それでは、またの指名をお待ちしておりますわ。: Then I shall await your next appointment.
笑顔で客を送り出し、１人になったシルヴィアは、<br>フゥッと１つ息を吐いた。:
After seeing her client out with a smile, Sylvia let out a quiet sigh
once she was alone.
……娼館で働き始めてから、お客様がまったく途切れませんわ。<br>お兄様のおっし:
...Since I started working at the brothel, the clients have not stopped
coming. Just as Elder Brother said, this establishment truly is popular.
娼館の人気もさることながら、客が途切れないということは、シルヴィア自身の<br>:
The brothel's popularity aside, her constant bookings meant Sylvia
herself was highly popular—though she didn't realize it.
シルヴィアさん、ちょっといいですか？: Sylvia, do you have a moment?
次のシルヴィアさんご指名のお客様なのですが、少し特殊な方でして……<br>これを:
It's about your next client, Sylvia. He's a rather special individual...
He's requested that you wear these.
ルディアが差し出したのは、何の変哲もない黒タイツだった。: Ludia held out a simple pair of black tights.
これを履けばいいんですの？<br>それくらいなら、お安い御用ですけど……: Simply wear these? That is simple enough, but...
ふふっ、ありがとうございます。<br>では、次のお客様を呼んでくるので、その間に:
Fufu, thank you very much. I'll go call your next client, so please get
ready in the meantime.
……確かに特殊なお客様ですわね。<br>黒タイツを履いてほしいだなんて……何がい:
...He is quite the peculiar client, is he not? Requesting that I wear
black tights... I wonder what he finds so intriguing about that?
とりあえず、準備をして待つとしましょうか。: Well, I suppose I shall simply prepare and await him.
シルヴィアが黒タイツを履いて待っていると、間もなくして客が訪れた。:
Soon after Sylvia had put on the black tights and was waiting, the
client arrived.
客はシルヴィアの姿を見て満足そうに頷くと、<br>すぐに自分の膝の上に座るように:
The client looked at Sylvia, nodded in satisfaction, and directed her
to sit on his lap.
